matrix_markdown:
## Utilization Gap Matrix — Data Assets x Trainable Components

Legend: **USED** = actually consumed by a promoted/current training or eval run · **PARTIALLY USED** = touched by some pipeline stage but not carried to a promoted result · **UNUSED (blocker)** = concrete technical/licensing/media blocker · **UNUSED (discipline)** = a standing rule (holdout, teacher-quality, contamination, protected-eval) forbids use · **NEVER QUEUED** = no technical or discipline reason exists, nobody ever built the pipeline — the organizational misses.

| Data Asset (size/rows) | Ball Detector | Event Head | Court Finder | Person Det. / ReID | Calibration / Eval Harnesses |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **data/pbvision_gallery_20260719** (12 videos, 164min, VM-only pixels) | UNUSED (discipline) — has_ball_2d/3d=true but usage_posture bars ball-detector training w/o a manager ruling | PARTIALLY USED — harvested into pbv_pickleball_corpus_20260720 teacher events, but corpus unwired (0/7,314 windows decodable) | **NEVER QUEUED** — has_court_calibration_keypoints=true on all 12, never touched by court_keypoint_net training or eval | UNUSED (blocker+discipline) — has_player_court_positions=true but has_player_pose_or_skeleton=false everywhere; no bbox task ever attempted | **NEVER QUEUED** — only 1/13 pb.vision videos (11-min demo) used as a benchmark compare card; the other 12 never staged as an eval harness |
| **runs/lanes/pbv_pickleball_corpus_20260720** (4,637 teacher HIT/BOUNCE events, 7,314 windows) | n/a (not a ball-box corpus) | UNUSED (blocker) — media_present=false for all rows, 0 decodable; LOADER_CHANGE_REQUIRED.diff sits unapplied; also teacher-derived not human GT (discipline) | n/a | n/a | UNUSED (blocker) — same media gap prevents even eval use |
| **data/event_labels_owner_20260719** (102 owner-answered rows) | n/a | PARTIALLY USED — banked as T11 fine-tune candidate but BLOCKED (pretrain checkpoint was 0-detection at ruling time) and gated on a mandatory zero-overlap check vs the protected 50-row seed | n/a | n/a | n/a |
| **Protected 50-row owner eval seed** (spot_check_tier_a_50 + results) | n/a | UNUSED (discipline, permanent) — training forbidden by design | n/a | n/a | **USED** — this IS the eval harness; ran and FAILED (29/50 vs ≥47/50 bar), which is exactly its job |
| **data/event_bootstrap_20260713** (audio-onset/contact-window bootstrap, 6.1MB) | n/a | USED → REJECTED — generated the Tier-A audio-cross-track auto-labels that the protected-50 spot-check then failed; result is a closed, adjudicated negative, not idle data | n/a | n/a | PARTIALLY USED — same audio_onsets_v0 clips (73VurrTKCZ8, Ezz6HDNHlnk) also underlie the online_harvest_20260706 CVAT ball packs | 
| **data/event_public_20260713** (6.0GB, ~10 public datasets, 74,546 usable events) | **NEVER QUEUED** — OpenTTGames alone carries 52,987 dense ball-track points that could pretrain a cross-sport ball detector; nobody built that loader | PARTIALLY USED — only 3/10 fetched datasets (jhong93_spot, openttgames, coachai_shuttleset = 74,546 events) are read by build_public_manifest; f3set, golfdb, squash_audio_figshare, shuttlecock_hitting_zenodo, padeltracker100, extended_openttgames, tt_sounds are fetched and licensed but **NEVER QUEUED** by the actual builder | **NEVER QUEUED** — none of these have court supervision, but no cross-sport court-camera pretrain was ever attempted either | **NEVER QUEUED** — PadelTracker100 has 906 shot-window player intervals, unused for ReID/detector pretrain | UNUSED — not wired as any eval harness despite full license ledger already built |
| **data/online_harvest_20260706** (8 raw MP4s, 88.5min, license_field=null) | **USED** — direct source pool for the w5/w6/w7 CVAT ball labelpacks feeding the whole ball-corpus growth chain | PARTIALLY USED — 2 of the 8 videos (73VurrTKCZ8, Ezz6HDNHlnk) fed the audio-onset bootstrap, which was rejected at eval | **NEVER QUEUED** — court_calibrations/ subdir (7 items) exists on these same videos but was never fed into court_keypoint_net training (still 100% synthetic) | **NEVER QUEUED** — no person-box CVAT task was ever created on any of these 8 videos | PARTIALLY USED — court_calibrations subdir plausibly backs the classical/geometric solver, not formally an eval harness |
| **data/online_harvest_20260712** (court-diversity YouTube pull, frames-only, video deleted post-extraction) | n/a | n/a | **NEVER QUEUED (stalled)** — 100 frames labeled via CVAT (court_diversity_20260712) and sitting reviewed, but zero real-data retrain of court_unet_v2 has ever consumed them; model remains 100% synthetic | n/a | UNUSED |
| **data/pbvision_11min_20260713** (11-min pb.vision demo, only gallery video with MP4 on Mac) | UNUSED (discipline) — training would invalidate the head-to-head comparison | UNUSED (discipline) — same reason | PARTIALLY USED — court_keypoint_frames extracted into eval_clips for keypoint-eval labeling only | UNUSED (discipline) | **USED** — the one deliberately-preserved compare-only benchmark card |
| **data/pbv_replay_20260720** (xkadsq9bli3h MP4, 186s, staged 2026-07-20) | **NEVER QUEUED** | **NEVER QUEUED** | **NEVER QUEUED** | **NEVER QUEUED** | **NEVER QUEUED** — acquired and staged locally, literally nothing built on it yet |
| **data/roboflow_universe_20260706** (6.9GB, 65 datasets, 80,967 core_pickleball image samples) | **NEVER QUEUED** — the single largest pickleball-labeled image pool in the repo; WASB default checkpoint is still 100% zero-shot tennis-pretrained with zero rows from this set | n/a (image-level, no event/temporal signal) | **NEVER QUEUED** — class_taxonomy_mapping explicitly normalizes a 'court' class across sources, never fed to court_keypoint_net (still trained purely on synthetic CAL-SYNTH) | **NEVER QUEUED** — 'person' class present in taxonomy mapping, never used against stock COCO YOLO26m/OSNet (adjacent_sport_aux 29,036 samples not even sport-filtered — 12/12 spot-checked as tennis, not pickleball) | UNUSED |
| **Ball label corpus chain** (w6→w7_ballingest4, 1,121→3,026 rows, CVAT-reviewed) | PARTIALLY USED — consumed only for LOSO candidate evaluation, never promoted to a fine-tune; 74.8% of the 2,388-row snapshot was found CONTAMINATED (discipline: contamination kill), blocking promotion | n/a | n/a | n/a | PARTIALLY USED — the LOSO harness itself is the eval consumer |
| **eval_clips/ball/** (4 protected clips, 69s combined, 11,459 person boxes) | **USED** — frozen promotion-adjacent eval fixture (explicitly not a promotion gate by itself) | PARTIALLY USED — only 4 event rows total (1/clip) vs the corpus's 74,546 public events; thin and never grown | **USED** — court_corners + court_keypoint_partial frames | **USED** — the ONLY human-reviewed person boxes in the repo; but CVAT is closed to further person tasks anywhere else — **NEVER QUEUED** for expansion off these 4 clips | **USED** — this bundle is the core eval harness substrate |
| **cvat_upload/** labelpacks (court_keypoints_20260707, court_diversity_20260712, w5/w6/w7 ball packs, w7_audit_stratum, 755MB) | **USED** (ball packs feed the corpus chain above) | n/a | **NEVER QUEUED (stalled)** — 106 real reviewed court-keypoint frames (6+100) exist ready-to-train, court model still trains purely on synthetic data | **NEVER QUEUED** — no person-box packages exist here at all | PARTIALLY USED |
| **data/testclips** (4 metadata-only entries, no media on disk) | UNUSED (blocker) | UNUSED (blocker) | UNUSED (blocker) | UNUSED (blocker) | UNUSED (blocker) — no video file exists in any of the 4 subdirs; unclear if retrievable |

### Reading the matrix
- The **court finder** column is the starkest miss: real reviewed court-keypoint labels exist in three separate places (online_harvest_20260712→100 CVAT frames, court_keypoints_20260707→6 frames, plus court_calibrations on the 8 online_harvest_20260706 raw videos) and the production learned network (court_unet_v2) has still never been trained on a single one of them — it is 100% synthetic (230,400 CAL-SYNTH samples) end to end.
- The **ball detector** column shows the same pattern at larger scale: 80,967 core-pickleball images in roboflow_universe_20260706 sit fully unused while the shipped default checkpoint remains the raw zero-shot WASB tennis model; the only pickleball-specific ball data ever touched (the 3,026-row CVAT corpus) never got past LOSO eval because of a contamination finding.
- The **person detector/ReID** column is the thinnest by design-or-neglect mix: the 11,459 human-reviewed boxes on 4 clips are the sole supervision anywhere in the repo, CVAT is closed to more, and two large image pools with a 'person' class (roboflow_universe) and player-position data (pbvision_gallery, online_harvest_20260706) were never even evaluated for a ReID/detector fine-tune.
- The **event head** column has real signal (74,546 public events across 3 datasets) but 7 more fetched public datasets and the entire pb.vision teacher corpus (4,637 events / 7,314 windows) sit unwired — the former by omission, the latter by a concrete media/loader gap.
never_queued_cells: data/roboflow_universe_20260706 x Ball Detector — 80,967 core_pickleball images never fed to any ball-detector training; WASB checkpoint remains raw zero-shot tennis
data/roboflow_universe_20260706 x Court Finder — 'court' class present in taxonomy mapping, never used; court_unet_v2 trained 100% synthetic
data/roboflow_universe_20260706 x Person Detector/ReID — 'person' class present in taxonomy mapping, never used against stock YOLO26m/OSNet

cvat_upload/ (court_keypoints_20260707 + court_diversity_20260712, 106 real reviewed frames) x Court Finder — reviewed real labels sit ready, court model still trains purely on synthetic CAL-SYNTH data
data/online_harvest_20260712 (100 CVAT court-diversity frames) x Court Finder — same stalled-real-data pattern as above
data/online_harvest_20260706 (8 raw source videos + court_calibrations subdir) x Court Finder — never fed into court_keypoint_net training
data/online_harvest_20260706 x Person Detector/ReID — no person-box CVAT task ever created on any of these 8 videos

data/event_public_20260713 (f3set, golfdb, squash_audio_figshare, shuttlecock_hitting_zenodo, padeltracker100, extended_openttgames, tt_sounds — 7 of ~10 fetched datasets) x Event Head — fetched/licensed but never read by build_public_manifest/datasets.py
data/event_public_20260713 OpenTTGames dense ball-track points (52,987 points) x Ball Detector — never used for cross-sport ball pretrain
data/pbvision_gallery_20260719 x Court Finder — has_court_calibration_keypoints=true on all 12 videos, never touched by court model training or eval
data/pbvision_gallery_20260719 (11 of 12 non-holdout videos) x Calibration/Eval Harnesses — never staged as a benchmark compare card the way the 11-min demo was
data/pbv_replay_20260720 x all 5 components — video staged locally 2026-07-20, nothing built on it yet
eval_clips/ball/ person boxes x Person Detector/ReID expansion — the only human-reviewed boxes in the repo, but no further person-box CVAT task exists anywhere else to grow this
top_underutilized_assets: data/roboflow_universe_20260706 — 6.9GB, 80,967 pickleball-labeled images across 59 sources, zero downstream training use in ANY of the 5 trainable components; single biggest idle asset in the repo by volume and by breadth of applicability (ball/court/person all have relevant classes in it)

cvat_upload/ + data/online_harvest_20260712 real court-keypoint labels (106 reviewed frames total) — ready-to-train real data that the production court_unet_v2 network has never touched; the model remains 100% synthetic-trained (230,400 CAL-SYNTH samples) despite this real supervision sitting reviewed and idle

data/event_public_20260713 — 7 of ~10 fetched public event/pose datasets (f3set, golfdb, squash_audio_figshare, shuttlecock_hitting_zenodo, padeltracker100, extended_openttgames, tt_sounds) were downloaded and license-cleared but never wired into the event-head training builder at all

runs/lanes/pbv_pickleball_corpus_20260720 — 4,637 teacher-derived events / 7,314 projected training windows built, but 0% decodable (media never staged locally) and the loader-change diff to consume it sits unapplied

data/pbvision_gallery_20260719 — 11 of 12 non-holdout gallery videos with full ball/court/net/bounce supervision have never been used even as an eval/benchmark comparison card, unlike the one 11-min demo that was
data/pbv_replay_20260720 — a full video staged on local disk with zero pipeline built on top of it since acquisition
